chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-6786 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.04 2. For hearing of CMA No.28684/2022 3. For hearing of main case 26.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 19.12.2022, which is almost 03 years ago, when learned counsel for the petitioner was called absent without intimation and the matter was adjourned in the interest of justice. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
